reasoning: The exclusion of Tesla products from the BC Hydro EV charger rebate program was implemented in mid-March 2025 as a direct retaliatory measure in the ongoing US-Canada trade war, specifically targeting Elon Musk's association with the US administration. As of late May 2025 (approaching the knowledge cutoff), news reports confirm that the trade war between the US and Canada is ongoing and expected to last for the "foreseeable future." Since July 2025 is only a month after the knowledge cutoff, there is very little time for the high-level geopolitical tensions to resolve, for a new policy to be drafted, and for BC Hydro to update its website to re-include Tesla. Additionally, political retaliations tied to "emergency powers" rarely unwind quickly. A reversal by July 1st is highly unlikely.
